requirement.description: If door status information is unavailable, the gateway shall transmit a door warning indication to the instrument cluster.
requirement.python_test_setup:
# ============================================================
# Gateway ECU – Fail-Safe Door Warning Tests (C-02)
# ============================================================
import time
import can
import pytest

GW_DOOR_STATUS_ID = 0x10E
GW_FAULT_STATUS_ID = 0x118
GW_DOOR_STATUS_DLC = 8

# ---------------------------
# CAN Bus Fixture
# ---------------------------
@pytest.fixture(scope="module")
def can_bus():
    bus = can.Bus(
        interface="vector",      # vector / socketcan / pcan configurable
        channel=0,
        bitrate=500000
    )
    yield bus
    bus.shutdown()

# ---------------------------
# Utility Functions
# ---------------------------
def collect_messages(bus, msg_id, duration_sec):
    messages = []
    start_time = time.time()
    while time.time() - start_time < duration_sec:
        msg = bus.recv(timeout=0.5)
        if msg and msg.arbitration_id == msg_id:
            messages.append(msg)
    return messages


def decode_any_door_open(msg):
    return (msg.data[0] >> 4) & 0x01


def decode_door_signal_timeout(msg):
    return (msg.data[0] >> 0) & 0x01

test_cases.title: Verify no door warning when door status available
test_cases.precondition: Vehicle ignition ON; Gateway ECU powered; CAN monitoring tool connected; door status messages transmitted normally
steps: Ensure door status messages are transmitted normally
test_cases.expected_result: No fail-safe door warning transmitted while door status information is available

test_cases.title: Verify DoorSignalTimeout flag set when input stops
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; door status input active initially
steps: Stop transmission of door status input via CAPL
Wait longer than configured door signal timeout

test_cases.title: Verify fail-safe door warning transmitted when status unavailable
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; door status input stopped
test_cases.expected_result: AnyDoorOpen = 1 transmitted as fail-safe door warning

test_cases.title: Verify individual door signals ignored during fail-safe
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; door status input unavailable
steps: Extract Door_FL, Door_FR, Door_RL, Door_RR signals
test_cases.expected_result: Individual door signals ignored; AnyDoorOpen = 1 remains active

test_cases.title: Verify fail-safe warning remains active during timeout
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; door status input unavailable
test_cases.expected_result: AnyDoorOpen remains set to 1 across messages

test_cases.title: Verify fail-safe clears after door status resumes
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; fail-safe door warning active
steps: Resume door status transmission via CAPL
Monitor GW_FaultStatus message and extract DoorSignalTimeout
Monitor GW_DoorStatus message and extract AnyDoorOpen
test_cases.expected_result: DoorSignalTimeout returns to 0 and AnyDoorOpen reflects actual door state

test_cases.title: Verify GW_DoorStatus message DLC during fail-safe
Verify fail-safe door warning stops on power OFF
test_cases.precondition: Gateway ECU active; fail-safe door warning active
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_failsafe_door_008_stop_on_power_off(can_bus):
    msgs_before = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_DOOR_STATUS_ID, 2)
    assert msgs_before
    time.sleep(3)
    msgs_after = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_DOOR_STATUS_ID, 2)
    assert not msgs_after
